meta.title: DEF CON 33 3- Red teaming fraud prevention systems with GenAI - Karthik Tadinada,  Martyn Higson
meta.description: Fraudsters are innovative and persistent, constantly trying out variations of attacks to breach fraud defenses. The advent of gen AI has made it easier for fraudsters to experiment. This talk will outline ways in which LLMs can be used to test the resilience of your fraud systems to fraudster attacks.
